_meta.note: mfsk_bits = the self-framed IZ8BLY MFSK Varicode bitstream fldigi's PSK-R/+F path feeds its FEC (varienc(c) codewords concatenated with NO separator). decoded = the round-trip through fldigi's rx_bit framing (shreg=(shreg<<1)|bit; on (shreg&7)==1 decode shreg>>1, reset shreg=1). The trailing 'C' is dropped because no following codeword supplies the boundary bit — this is fldigi's exact behaviour for this input, so omnimodem must reproduce it byte-for-byte.
